function initializeOwner(bytes32 batchId, address owner) external
function logTransfer(bytes32 batchId, address to, string calldata metadataURI) external
function getTransfers(bytes32 batchId) external view returns (tuple(bytes32 batchId, address from, address to, string metadataURI, uint256 timestamp)[] memory)
event TransferLogged(bytes32 indexed batchId, address indexed from, address indexed to, string metadataURI, uint256 timestamp)
